data.description:
issue-summary.sh parses a legacy human-readable show format, but show emits JSON. Every ticket renders as '<id> [unknown] { (ready)'.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] summary shows correct status (open/in_progress/closed/blocked/archived)
- [ ] summary shows correct title
- [ ] blocked-by deps still surface
- [ ] works for one and multiple ids
data.title: summary renders [unknown] status and '{' title against JSON show output
